title: magnolia macrophylla var. dealbata
intro: Magnolia macrophylla var. dealbata, also known as the Southern Magnolia or Swamp Magnolia, is a deciduous tree native to the southeastern United States. The bark and leaves of this plant contain medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Magnolia macrophylla var. dealbata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
